problem.title: CT-ICP paper-comparable on KITTI Odometry 07 (full, 1101 frames)
problem.question: Does CT-ICP reach the paper-reported RPE 0.30% on KITTI Odometry 07 in default pure-odometry mode? How much does --ct-icp-gt-seed change it?

variants.label: Default (paper-comparable pure odometry)
variants.intent: CT-ICP default = pure odometry. This is the directly paper-comparable variant.

variants.label: GT-seeded TrajectoryFrame init (Policy A reference)
variants.intent: Symmetric Policy A reference — non-comparable to paper, kept to quantify the GT-seed advantage.
